title: Matrix dropdown (typed cells)
description: matrixdropdown — a grid whose cells are typed editors, one per (row, column). The answer is a nested object {row: {column: value}}, e.g. {"laptop": {"brand": "apple", "os": "mac"}}. The warehouse decomposes it into one sub-question per cell (stable_name "devices.laptop.brand", "devices.laptop.os", …), each resolving to an option_key. M5.3 supports option-based cell types only (dropdown / radiogroup); free-text, rating, and other cell types are rejected at publish until their value storage + PII routing land. A column's own `choices` win; otherwise it inherits the matrix-level shared `choices`.
